subject: Sports
title: Brazil 1970: The Beautiful Game
description: A fast breakdown of Brazil 1970: The Beautiful Game for builders.

hook.text: One World Cup team played football so beautifully that it redefined what the sport could be.

buildup.text: Brazil's 1970 squad featured Pele, Jairzinho, Tostao, and Rivelino—an attacking lineup of pure genius.

discovery.text: They won all six matches, scoring 19 goals. Every goal was a masterclass in movement and vision.

twist.text: The final against Italy ended 4-1. Carlos Alberto's goal—a sweeping team move—is considered the greatest ever.

climax.text: Brazil kept the Jules Rimet trophy permanently as the first nation to win three World Cups.

punchline.text: They didn't just win. They showed the world how football should be played.

quiz.question: How many goals did Brazil score in the 1970 World Cup?
